summary: Tested Persona Engine v1 integration with Growth Engine. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Personas section visible in GrowthPanel sidebar with list of personas, + button to add, trash button to delete. Create persona form works correctly. Delete persona removes from list. Auto-seeded personas appear after first crawl. Analyze endpoint works with personas present (persona injected into AI prompt).

test_classes: TestPersonaAuthRequired (3 tests) - POST /api/personas/create, GET /api/personas, DELETE /api/personas/:id return 401 without auth
TestPersonaCreate (5 tests) - Create persona with name/description returns 201, missing/empty/whitespace name returns 400
TestPersonaList (1 test) - GET /api/personas returns {personas: [...]} with id, name, description
TestPersonaDelete (2 tests) - DELETE /api/personas/:id returns 200, non-existent returns 404
TestAutoSeedPersonas (2 tests) - First crawl seeds 3 personas, second crawl does NOT re-seed (idempotent)
TestAnalyzeWithPersona (1 test) - POST /api/growth/analyze works with personas present
TestPersonaCleanup (1 test) - Cleanup TEST_ prefixed personas

features_tested.feature: Growth button visible in TopBar after login
GrowthPanel has Personas section in sidebar
Personas section shows list of personas with count badge
Create persona form accepts name and description
Trash button deletes persona from list
Auto-seeded personas appear (Referral Visitor, Return Visitor, First-Time Visitor)
Trending section still visible with HN trends

seed_data_creation: Auto-seeded 3 personas (First-Time Visitor, Return Visitor, Referral Visitor) based on 'generic' site type detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persona Engine v1 fully integrated with Growth Engine. Personas are auto-seeded on first crawl based on detected site type (ecommerce/content/app/generic). Persona CRUD routes are in route.js (POST /api/personas/create, GET /api/personas, DELETE /api/personas/:id). Auto-seed and analyze persona injection are in server.py. The persona_profiles MongoDB collection has index on (user_id, created_at). Personas are injected into the AI analyze prompt to tailor recommendations to the target audience.
